canonical_question: What are the IFS REST API capabilities for aerospace, defense, and energy integrations?
aliases: IFS Cloud OData REST API endpoints, projections, and rate limits
How to integrate with IFS Cloud ERP using the projection-based REST API
IFS Cloud API authentication with OAuth 2.0 and IFS IAM
IFS REST API capabilities for MRO, asset management, and field service integrations
constraints: Rate limits not publicly documented — IFS uses fair-use throttling; excessive requests trigger 429 responses
Only OAuth 2.0 via IFS IAM supported — no API keys, no basic auth
Premium APIs have compatibility guarantees; Standard APIs may change between releases without notice
Custom projections require IFS Developer Studio and deployment as customization packages
IFS Connect required for outbound event-driven integrations — no native webhooks
Complex business logic cannot live in OData layer — runs in PL/SQL
